violations.text: Homemade risotto that was made and date marked from over 7 days ago was observed in the walk-in cooler. Items prepared and cooked on-site must be used within 7 days. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
The gasket of the prep unit was observed to be frayed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024
